summary: Comprehensive testing of Plano de Obras (Project Plan) feature completed successfully. All backend APIs (CRUD for obras, machine linking via PATCH, cost calculations) working correctly. Frontend UI flows functional with proper integration. Low stock alerts also verified working.
passed_tests: Backend: Create Obra - POST /api/obras
Backend: List Obras - GET /api/obras
Backend: Get Obra Detail - GET /api/obras/{id}
Backend: Update Obra - PUT /api/obras/{id}
Backend: Delete Obra - DELETE /api/obras/{id}
Backend: Get Non-existent Obra returns 404
Backend: Link Machine to Obra - PATCH /api/machines/{id}/obra
Backend: Unlink Machine from Obra (set obra_id to null)
Backend: Create Machine with obra_id
Backend: Obra Maintenance Cost Calculation (total, preventive, corrective)
Backend: Obra List Shows Machine Count and Total Costs
Backend: Filter Machines by obra_id - GET /api/machines?obra_id={id}
Backend: Delete Obra Unlinks Machines (doesn't delete them)
Backend: Low Stock Notification in /api/notifications
Backend: Dashboard Low Stock Count
Frontend: Login and Navigation to Obras Page
Frontend: Obras Page List Display with Cards
Frontend: Create New Obra Dialog and Form
Frontend: Obra Creation Success Toast
Frontend: Search/Filter Obras by Name/Location/Description
Frontend: Edit Obra Dialog with Pre-filled Data
Frontend: Obra Update Success Toast
Frontend: Obra Detail Page with Stats Cards
Frontend: Obra Detail - Resumo de Custos (Cost Summary)
Frontend: Obra Detail - Máquinas na Obra Section
Frontend: Obra Detail - Manutenções Realizadas Section
Frontend: Add Machine to Obra Dialog
Frontend: Notifications Page with Alert Information
seed_data_creation: Test data created via curl by main agent: 1 obra 'Obra Teste BR-101', 1 category 'Tratores', 1 machine 'Trator John Deere' linked to obra, 1 maintenance of R$150.00
context_for_next_testing_agent: Plano de Obras feature fully implemented and tested. CRUD operations for obras work correctly. Machine linking via PATCH /api/machines/{id}/obra works. Maintenance costs are automatically calculated and displayed in obra detail page. Low stock alerts are working in notifications. Test user credentials: test@test.com / password

obras_crud.create: Working - POST /api/obras creates obra with all fields
obras_crud.read_list: Working - GET /api/obras returns list with machine_count and total_maintenance_cost
obras_crud.read_detail: Working - GET /api/obras/{id} returns full detail with machines, maintenances, and cost breakdown
obras_crud.delete: Working - DELETE /api/obras/{id} removes obra and unlinks machines

machine_linking.link_via_patch: Working - PATCH /api/machines/{id}/obra with obra_id links machine
machine_linking.unlink_via_patch: Working - PATCH /api/machines/{id}/obra with null unlinks machine
machine_linking.link_on_create: Working - POST /api/machines with obra_id creates linked machine

cost_calculation.total_cost: Working - Sum of all maintenance part_values for machines in obra
cost_calculation.preventive_cost: Working - Sum of preventiva maintenance costs
cost_calculation.corrective_cost: Working - Sum of corretiva maintenance costs

low_stock_alerts.notifications_api: Working - /api/notifications includes stock_low and stock_empty alerts
